calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition Andrew Leon Petition Relieving Petitioner From Provisions Of Gov. Code 945.4 And To File Suit Pursuant To Gov. Code 946.6
Off Calendar Jun-30-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Robert Buzzard, Esq. (925-308-9848; robert@amb.law) of Ayala, Morgan & Buzzard for Petitioner.
Steven Weinmann, Esq. (510-879-1300; Steven.Weinmann@doj.ca.gov) Deputy Attorney General for Respondent.

A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER ANDREW LEON'S Petition Relieving Petitioner From Provisions Of Gov. Code 945.4 And To File Suit Pursuant To Gov. Code 946.6 is TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Deanne Goyke, CSR# 11413, (925.416.1800; nicole@pjreporters.com), Reported. =(302/RBU)

***Order DENYING PETITION FOR RELIEF PURSUANT TO GOV. CODE 946.6. is signed after hearing.***
